speaker: Donald J. Trump
quote: We inherited very high prices and the highest inflation in the history of our country.
venue: Press Gaggle on Air Force One
claim_text: Trump said Biden-era inflation was the highest in U.S. history.

assessment.rationale:
Evidence:
- The quote claims inflation was the highest or worst in U.S. history.
- Official CPI records (BLS, including the CPI release archive and the FRED CPI series sourced from BLS) show inflation peaked at a higher level in 1980 than during the 2021-2022 surge.
- The Biden-era inflation spike was severe, but not the historical maximum in the official CPI record.

Why This Is False:
- The statement uses an absolute historical claim (highest ever).
- Official CPI history shows higher inflation occurred in earlier periods, so the claim is not accurate.

Shut Down False Argument:
- Describing inflation as painful does not make it the highest on record.
- The same official data used to describe the recent spike directly shows higher historical peaks.
